libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native-test runtime system properties for 5.0.1: `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`. Core coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server; no external service is required. Avoid optional OAuth2-specific coverage unless adding its optional Vert.x auth dependency deliberately.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Without the Netty/JDK 25 system properties, native-image run can fail even when the generated WebClient tests are otherwise valid.
Testing optional paths such as `OAuth2WebClient` may require optional dependencies not needed for normal WebClient coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 is self-contained for meaningful WebClient coverage, but it transitively uses Vert.x Core with Netty 4.2.2.Final; Java 25 native-image runs need the same Netty unsafe/reflection system properties already used for 5.0.0.
